team_name: AI-Based Court Judgment Action Intelligence System
summary: Build an AI system that reads court judgment PDFs, extracts key information, generates a structured action plan, and ensures human-verified data is presented in a dashboard for government use.
key_steps: Suggest whether to comply / appeal / review
Display only trusted outputs on dashboard
optimization_claims: Faster Governance | Better Compliance | Smarter Decision-Making
constraints_addressed: Must handle complex, inconsistent legal PDFs
Outputs must be explainable and verifiable
Focus on decision support, not full automation
